content: PSA for pet owners: my vet just reminded me that xylitol (found in sugar-free gum, candy, and some peanut butters) is extremely toxic to dogs — even tiny amounts can cause liver failure. Please check your labels and keep these products out of reach. Please share so other dog parents know 🐶❤️
